notes: Untrusted mode: session created, pod started (Running 1/1), test pane completed (311 pass), devtools Docker image built. But tmux session 'test' disappeared ~4 minutes into setup. Pod also deleted. Agent and shell panes never showed output (kubectl exec waiting). Suspect: gracefullyKillSession (unstaged tmux.ts change using pkill -s) may have been triggered, or the in-session reinvoke CLI exited with error causing the session's first window to close and tmux to destroy the session.
